findings.evidence: `rg` hits: `Topology/Homotopy/AmbientIsotopyClassAction.lean:72` proves the general `postcompHomeomorphEquiv_apply_eq_smul`; `Geometry/Diffeomorphism/AmbientIsotopyClassAction.lean:73-78` repeats the same induction for `φ.toHomeomorph`.
findings.fix: Derive this special case from the general lemma, e.g. rewrite with `AmbientIsotopyClass.postcompHomeomorphEquiv_apply_eq_smul` and `ambientIsotopyClass_smul_eq_homeomorph_smul`, instead of another representative proof.
findings.issue: `ambientIsotopyClass_postcompHomeomorphEquiv_apply` reproves by quotient induction the self-homeomorphism statement already added as `AmbientIsotopyClass.postcompHomeomorphEquiv_apply_eq_smul`.

summary: The API is mostly at the natural self-homeomorphism/self-diffeomorphism action level, but one diffeomorphism lemma duplicates the general homeomorphism proof instead of specializing it.
